title: Silverhook Big Boy Metal Filler, 250 ml BIG21 (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
description: From the manufacturer Big Boy Metal Filler Excellent Thermal Conductivity Excellent adhesion to metals Ultra Tough 250ml Available Silverhook Professional Polyester Ultra Tough Metal Filler offers easy application and excellent sanding properties. It is a two component putty for application on surfaces that are subject to vibrations and frequent temperature changes. The Metal Filler has excellent thermal conductivity due to Aluminium particles within the product and its gripping ability to Steel, Aluminium, and zinc. Metal Filler can also be used as a general purpose filler on concrete, brick, and wood. As the filler is corrosion-resistant it makes a perfect exterior filler on areas requiring a smooth paint finish. Step 1 Ensure surface to be filled is free from grease and loose dirt. Brush off surface dust with damp cloth and leave to dry. Step 2 Mix the filler with hardener in the ratio supplied, (e.g. half tin of filler - half a tube of hardener) thoroughly to obtain a uniform colour. Step 3 Apply mixture immediately with firm pressure using spreader and build up to required level. Paste will start to harden within 5 minutes. Note: Hardening times will vary. Step 4 Leave to set for approximately 1 hour. Once dry surface can be sanded and wiped over.
